atomic_units.action: HR Business Partner follows up with the employee to confirm that all system accesses are working correctly
HR Business Partner raises a follow‑up IT ticket with IT Support and marks it as high priority
atomic_units.condition: If the employee reports any access issues

atomic_units.action: IT Support resolves the access issues within one business day of the follow‑up ticket being raised
HR Business Partner escalates the matter to the IT Manager
atomic_units.condition: If the access issue is not resolved within one business day
